settings.heading: Business resources and practical support pathways
settings.text: Use Essentials to find practical templates, toolkits, documentation support and small business pathways such as Business NBN, finance, insurance and marketplace support. Some options are self-serve; others require provider checks, eligibility review, serviceability, approval or external terms.

settings.heading: Start with the resource or support type you need
settings.text: Essentials is a routing hub for practical business resources. If a pathway needs eligibility, serviceability, approval or specialist provider input, use support before relying on it for a decision.

settings.title: Business NBN
settings.text: Check business connectivity support, availability boundaries and next steps before choosing a plan or service pathway.

settings.title: Business Finance
settings.text: Use support before funding enquiries if you need help understanding what information may be required or where provider eligibility applies.

settings.title: Business Insurance
settings.text: Insurance pathways may involve external quote processes, policy terms, eligibility and provider assessment.

settings.title: Marketplace
settings.text: Explore marketplace context and partner pathways where available, with external terms or offer conditions checked before action.

settings.heading: Practical documents and resource support
settings.text: Use templates, toolkits and documentation suites when a practical starting point is enough. If the business context is unclear, use support before purchase or implementation.

settings.title: Templates
settings.text: Reusable starting documents for practical business tasks where you can adapt the output yourself.

settings.title: Toolkits
settings.text: Guided packs, prompts and checks for common business setup, compliance or operating tasks.

settings.title: Documentation suites
settings.text: Prepared or supported document pathways for work that needs more structure than a single template.

settings.heading: Check provider and support conditions before relying on a pathway
settings.text: Essentials helps route practical business support, but it does not guarantee external provider outcomes. Finance, insurance, NBN and partner offers may be subject to provider eligibility, serviceability, approval, quote terms, availability and external conditions.

settings.title: Not regulated advice
settings.text: RBP resources do not replace legal, tax, accounting, financial product, insurance or other regulated professional advice.

settings.title: Provider terms apply
settings.text: External finance, insurance, NBN and partner pathways can depend on provider eligibility, serviceability, approval, quote terms and availability.

settings.title: Ask if unsure
settings.text: Use Support or Contact before choosing a product, provider pathway or resource if the right route is unclear.

settings.heading: Not sure which resource or pathway fits?
settings.text: Contact support with the business context, product or service you are considering, timing pressure and the outcome you need.
